001.name: Project foundation — install deps, design system, component library
001.acceptance: npm run build passes, design tokens defined, Footer component created, Playwright installed
001.notes: Build passes. design-tokens.js created with full token set. Footer.js with 4-column link grid + copyright. Playwright installed with Chromium. GSC meta tag added to _app.js. Vision score of homepage: 4.8/10 — to be fixed in task 002.

002.name: Homepage redesign — Option D editorial style with hero, features, social proof, CTA
002.acceptance: Homepage renders with editorial layout, hero section, feature highlights, CTA. Vision model score >= 7.
002.notes: Full redesign with hero, stats bar, 6 feature cards, comparison table vs Churnkey, social proof quotes, waitlist CTA, blog section. Build passes.

003.name: Alternative homepage styles — Options A, B, C on /styles/ pages
003.acceptance: 3 alternative homepage designs accessible at /styles/developer, /styles/warm-saas, /styles/data-forward. Each visually distinct.
003.notes: Created style explorer index + 3 alternatives: A=Developer (dark, terminal, code-first), B=Warm SaaS (rounded, friendly, emoji), C=Data-Forward (charts, metrics, analytical). Build passes.

004.name: Blog system upgrade — tags, pagination, RSS, improved post layout
004.acceptance: Blog listing page at /blog, posts have tags, RSS feed at /rss.xml, improved typography
004.notes: Blog listing with featured post, tag pills, reading time. Post pages with OG tags, tags, related posts, reading time. RSS generated at build time. Tags added to existing posts.

005.name: SEO blog posts — 4 high-quality posts for content pillars
005.acceptance: 4 new markdown posts: churn guide, cancel flow examples, involuntary churn, why-free. Each 1500+ words with proper frontmatter.
005.notes: 4 SEO posts created: Ultimate Guide (1850w), Cancel Flow Examples (2325w), Involuntary Churn (2344w), Why Free (1936w). All have tags, excerpts, proper frontmatter. Build passes, RSS updated.

006.name: Comparison pages — programmatic /compare/ and /alternatives/ pages
006.acceptance: 5+ comparison pages render with honest feature matrices, pricing comparisons, CTAs. SEO-optimized.
006.notes: 5 comparison pages (/compare/churnkey, profitwell, churnbuster, stunning, baremetrics) + 5 alternatives pages. Feature matrix with green/yellow/red badges, pricing comparison, verdict. Committed and pushed.

007.name: Interactive cancel flow demo widget
007.acceptance: Interactive demo at /demo showing a cancel flow in action. User can click through steps. Looks professional.
007.notes: Full cancel flow demo: reason picker (6 options) → smart offer based on reason → save/lost outcome screen with analytics preview. Browser mockup chrome with progress bar. Vision score: 44/50 (8.8/10). Build passes.

008.name: Churn calculator tool
008.acceptance: Interactive calculator at /tools/churn-calculator. User inputs MRR + churn rate, sees potential savings. Shareable.
008.notes: Interactive calculator with MRR + churn rate + save rate sliders. Shows monthly/annual revenue at risk and potential savings. Industry benchmarks as helper text. Vision score: 41/50 (8.2/10). Build passes.

009.name: Features page + developer docs page
009.notes: Features page was already built. Created comprehensive docs page with sidebar nav, code examples, API reference, Stripe integration guide, React SDK docs, FAQ. Build passes.
009.acceptance: Features page with detailed feature descriptions. Docs page with code examples, integration guide.

010.name: Cancel flow templates gallery
010.notes: 6 templates with gallery page, individual pages with interactive preview + code, reason-offer mapping. Build passes.
010.acceptance: Template gallery at /templates with 5+ cancel flow templates. Each template has preview + code snippet.

011.name: SEO infrastructure — sitemap, robots.txt, OG images, structured data, GSC verification
011.notes: Sitemap (33 URLs), robots.txt, 8 OG images (SVG), JSON-LD Organization+WebSite, default OG/Twitter meta in _app.js. Build passes.
011.acceptance: sitemap.xml generates all pages, robots.txt configured, GSC meta tag in head, JSON-LD on all pages, OG meta tags on all pages.

012.name: D1 database setup + waitlist API + waitlist form component
012.acceptance: D1 database created, waitlist table exists, POST /api/waitlist stores emails, WaitlistForm component works on homepage.

013.name: Mobile responsiveness pass + visual QA
013.acceptance: All pages look good at 390px, 768px, 1440px. Vision model scores >= 7 on all pages at all breakpoints.

014.name: Final polish — navigation, footer links, 404 page, loading states, favicon
014.acceptance: Navigation links work across all pages. Footer has sitemap links. 404 page styled. All internal links valid.

notes: Task 001: Homepage vision score is 4.8/10 — main issues: no accent color usage, placeholder copy, weak value prop, no CTA. Task 002 will fix all of these.
Task 001: Footer uses onMouseEnter/Leave for hover states — works but may need styled-jsx or CSS modules in future for cleaner approach.
Vision model feedback key themes: add accent color usage, real value prop, remove placeholder copy, style CTAs, fix article cards.
Tasks 007+008 were both completed in prior session and committed. Vision scores: demo 44/50, calculator 41/50. Both well above 7/10 threshold.

update_log.summary: Created lib/design-tokens.js, components/Footer.js, updated _app.js with Footer + GSC meta tag, installed Playwright + Chromium. Build passes. Committed.

Comparison pages already built in prior session. Committed lib/comparisons.js + /compare/[slug].js + /alternatives/[slug].js. 5 competitors each with feature matrix, pricing, verdict. Pushed to origin/main.
Tasks 007 and 008 were completed in prior session (commit a4c17de). Verified via screenshots: demo 44/50 (8.8/10), calculator 41/50 (8.2/10). Both pass quality bar. STATE.json advanced to task 009.
